text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day the students get their race times
officially measured. Everyone's brimming with
excitement, as well as anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I beat my time! It's all thanks to you,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: I knew you had it in you! Keep up the great work!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
choice_data_list: Hey there. How was your time?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Listen and be amazed! I crushed my
previous best!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Not that that's a surprise or anything. I am always number one, after all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's not what I meant to say. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know, Trainer... I-I mean, obviously, I'm
perfect and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I guess I'm saying... It wasn't all thanks to me, so...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just... keep up the good work, okay?! Y-you
better not slack off!
